---
title: Re-running UMAP on UBC clusters
date: 2024-07-31
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Goal of this analysis

1. Regen UMAP plots for poster
2. Rerun UMAP on UBC clusters

# Files and directories

## Input

CCA FC file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240516/cca/20240516_cca_integ.qs`

CCA RL file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/rl_cca.qs`

CCA UBC file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240527/ubc_subset.qs`

## Output

The output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap`

# Process and Results

Using the `scrnaseq_env` conda environment

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(qs)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(pals)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
```

```{r}
set.seed(1)
out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap"
if (!dir.exists(out_directory)) {
  dir.create(out_directory, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

Loading in datasets
```{r}
fc_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240516/cca/20240516_cca_integ.qs")
```
```{r}
okabe(8)
palette <- c("#009E73", "#E69F00")

plt <- DimPlot(fc_cca, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "species", cols = alpha(palette, 0.5), raster=FALSE) +
  labs(title = NULL) +   # Remove title
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),  # Removes axis labels (text)
    axis.ticks = element_blank()  # Removes axis ticks
  )
ggsave(filename = "fc_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Regenerated FC UMAP](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap/fc_umap.png)

```{r}
rl_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/rl_cca.qs")
```
```{r}
# Using snn_res.0.4
plt <- DimPlot(rl_cca, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "snn_res.0.4", cols = as.vector(trubetskoy())) +
  labs(title = NULL) +   # Remove title
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),  # Removes axis labels (text)
    axis.ticks = element_blank()  # Removes axis ticks
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
ggsave(filename = "rl_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)

DefaultAssay(rl_cca) <- "RNA"
feature_plot <- FeaturePlot(object = rl_cca, features = "EOMES", order = TRUE, min.cutoff = "q10", max.cutoff = "q90", raster = FALSE) +   # Remove title
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),  # Removes axis labels (text)
    axis.ticks = element_blank()  # Removes axis ticks
  )
ggsave(filename = "EOMES.png", plot = feature_plot, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Regenerated RL UMAP](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap/rl_umap.png)

![Regenerated EOMES expression in RL UMAP](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap/EOMES.png)

```{r}
ubc_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240527/ubc_subset.qs")
ubc_rpca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240606/rpca_20_analysis/ubc/ubc.qs")
```
```{r}
ubc_cca <- RunUMAP(ubc_cca, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:25)

ubc_cca$Clusters <- paste0("UBC_", ubc_cca$snn_res.0.3)
plt <- DimPlot(ubc_cca, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "Clusters", cols = alpha(as.vector(trubetskoy()),0.6), pt.size = 0.5, label.box = TRUE) +
  labs(title = NULL) +   # Remove title
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),  # Removes axis labels (text)
    axis.ticks = element_blank()  # Removes axis ticks
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(filename = "ubc_cca_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)

plt <- DimPlot(ubc_cca, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "species", cols = as.vector(trubetskoy())) +
  labs(title = NULL)
ggsave(filename = "ubc_cca_species_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Regenerated CCA UBC UMAP](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap/ubc_cca_umap.png)

![Regenerated CCA UBC UMAP split by species](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap/ubc_cca_species_umap.png)

```{r}
ubc_rpca <- RunUMAP(ubc_rpca, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:25)

ubc_rpca$Clusters <- paste0("UBC_", ubc_rpca$snn_res.0.6)
plt <- DimPlot(ubc_rpca, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "Clusters", cols = alpha(as.vector(trubetskoy()),0.6), pt.size = 0.5, label.box = TRUE) +
  labs(title = NULL) +   # Remove title
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),  # Removes axis labels (text)
    axis.ticks = element_blank()  # Removes axis ticks
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(filename = "ubc_rpca_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)

plt <- DimPlot(ubc_rpca, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, group.by = "species", cols = as.vector(trubetskoy())) +
  labs(title = NULL)
ggsave(filename = "ubc_rpca_species_umap.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Regenerated RPCA UBC UMAP](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap/ubc_rpca_umap.png)

![Regenerated RPCA UBC UMAP split by species](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap/ubc_rpca_species_umap.png)

```{r}
source("/u/llau/software/mb_scrnaseq/MB_scRNAseq/software/utilities/cluster_barplot.R")

palette <- as.vector(trubetskoy(6))
plt <- cluster_barplot(ubc_cca, split.by = "Clusters", group.by = "species", position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) + # Custom colors
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportion of Cells") 


bar_plot_name <- "ubc_cca_species_bar_plot.png"
ggsave(filename = bar_plot_name, plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
          width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Cluster proportions per species bar plot](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap/ubc_cca_species_bar_plot.png)

```{r eval=FALSE}
source("/u/llau/software/mb_scrnaseq/MB_scRNAseq/scrnaseq_Leo/utilities/jaccard_matrix.R")

# CCA 0.3 vs RPCA 0.6
png(file.path(out_directory, "cca_0.3_rpca_0.6_jaccard_sim_heatmap.png"),width=14,height=12,units="in",res=1200)
matrix <- jaccard_matrix(ubc_cca, 0.3, ubc_rpca, 0.6)

cca_proportion_test <- read.csv("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240718/proportion_test/cca/cca_ubc_clusters_proportion_test.csv")
rpca_proportion_test <- read.csv("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240718/proportion_test/rpca/rpca_ubc_clusters_proportion_test.csv")

log2fold_cca <- as.vector(cca_proportion_test$obs_log2FD)
log2fold_rpca <- as.vector(rpca_proportion_test$obs_log2FD)

palette <- c("#E69F00", "#FFFFFF", "#009E73")
col_fun = colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), palette)

cca_counts <- as.vector(table(ubc_cca$snn_res.0.3))
rpca_counts <- as.vector(table(ubc_rpca$snn_res.0.6))

col_ha = HeatmapAnnotation(cell_count = anno_barplot(rpca_counts, add_numbers = TRUE, ylim = c(0, 1400)), log2FD = log2fold_rpca, col = list(log2FD = col_fun), height = unit(1.5, "in"), show_legend = c("log2FD" = FALSE))
row_ha = rowAnnotation(cell_count = anno_barplot(cca_counts, add_numbers = TRUE, axis_param = list(direction = "reverse"), ylim = c(0, 1400)), log2FD = log2fold_cca, col = list(log2FD = col_fun), 
                          width = unit(1.5, "in"),
                          annotation_legend_param = list(
                            log2FD = list(
                                  title = "Log2 Fold Difference",
                                  grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
                                  legend_height = unit(2, "in")
                                )))

Heatmap(matrix, name = "Jaccard Similarity", 
    width = unit(8, "in"), height = unit(8, "in"),
    row_names_side = "right", row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
    row_dend_side = "left", row_title_side = "left",
    row_title = "CCA 0.3", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_title = "RPCA 0.6", column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 15),
    cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
      if(matrix[i, j] > 0.05)
            grid.text(sprintf("%.2f", matrix[i, j]), x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 15))
      },
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
        legend_height = unit(2, "in")
    ),
    top_annotation = col_ha, left_annotation = row_ha
  ) 
dev.off()
```

![Regenerated heatmap](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap/cca_0.3_rpca_0.6_jaccard_sim_heatmap.png)

```{r}
regulon_csv <- read.csv("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/pyscenic/20240704/cell_type_annot/aldinger_sepp_RL.rss.csv") 
rownames(regulon_csv) <- regulon_csv$X
regulon_csv <- regulon_csv[, -which(names(regulon_csv) == "X")]
regulon_csv <- t(regulon_csv)
regulon_csv_df <- as.data.frame(regulon_csv)

ubc_1 <- regulon_csv_df[, "UBC_1", drop = FALSE] %>%
  arrange(desc(UBC_1)) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number(),
    gene = rownames(.),
    highlight = ifelse(rank <= 4, "Top 4", "Other")) 
```
```{r}
plt <- ggplot(ubc_1, aes(x = rank, y = UBC_1)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = highlight), size = 3) +  # Points with color based on Highlight
    geom_text(data = filter(ubc_1, rank <= 4),  # Add labels for the top 4 points
              aes(label = gene), 
              hjust = -1, vjust = 0.5, size = 3.5, color = "black") +  # Adjust text position and color
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Top 4" = "red", "Other" = "black")) +  # Custom colors
    labs(x = "Rank", y = "Regulon Specificity Score (RSS)", color = "Legend") +  # Labels
    theme_classic() + # Minimal theme
    theme(legend.position = "none") # Remove legend

ggsave(filename = "ubc_1_regulon.png", plot = plt, path = out_directory, 
            width = 5, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

![Regenerated UBC_1 regulon graph](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240731/regen_umap/ubc_1_regulon.png)
